ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training dataset used for the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "evaluation_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation method used for the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the model is currently active */,
  "last_deployed_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last deployed */,
  "last_evaluated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last evaluated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_evaluation_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_method_id") REFERENCES evaluation_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES training_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dataset is private */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance being predicted */,
  "actual_class" INTEGER /* Actual class of the instance */,
  "predicted_class" INTEGER /* Predicted class of the instance */,
  "distribution_0" REAL /* Probability distribution for class 0 */,
  "distribution_1" REAL /* Probability distribution for class 1 */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., batch, real-time) */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific version of the model that made the prediction */,
  "instance_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the instance being predicted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model for which the metric is calculated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "evaluation_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation method used for the metric */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_evaluation_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_method_id") REFERENCES evaluation_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of action */,
  "action_source" TEXT /* Source of the action (e.g., web, API) */,
  "action_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being compared */,
  "version_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first version being compared */,
  "version_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second version being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was made */,
  "comparison_metrics" TEXT /* JSON string containing comparison metrics (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comparison has been approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the comparison */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date the comparison was approved */,
  "comparison_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation method */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the evaluation method is the default method */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the evaluation method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the evaluation method was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the evaluation method */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the evaluation method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_methods_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_methods_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
